queries.question: For each of the food critics, list the corresponding cuisine.
queries.sql: select food_critics.critic_name , cuisines.cuisine_name from Food_Critics_Cuisines join Cuisines on Food_Critics_Cuisines.cuisine_id = Cuisines.id join Food_Critics on Food_Critics_Cuisines.food_critic_id = Food_Critics.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?critic_name ?cuisine_name WHERE {
  ?food_critics_cuisines a :Food_Critics_Cuisines .
  ?cuisines a :Cuisines .
  ?food_critics_cuisines p:hasCuisines ?cuisines .
  ?food_critics a :Food_Critics .
  ?food_critics_cuisines p:hasFood_Critics ?food_critics .
  ?food_critics p:critic_name ?critic_name .
  ?cuisines p:cuisine_name ?cuisine_name .
}

queries.question: List the cuisines that every food critic reviews.
queries.sql: SELECT Cuisines.cuisine_name  from Food_Critics_Cuisines join Cuisines on Food_Critics_Cuisines.cuisine_id = Cuisines.id join Food_Critics on Food_Critics_Cuisines.food_critic_id = Food_Critics.id   GROUP BY Food_Critics_Cuisines.cuisine_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Food_Critics_Cuisines.food_critic_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Food_Critics)

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the cuisines that every food critic reviews.
